Title is always replaced."},"pull_request_number":{"type":["number","string"],"description":"Pull request number to update. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 234 in github.com/owner/repo/pull/234). If omitted, uses the current working branch. Only specify if you need to push from a different branch."},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Commit message describing the changes. Use this to confirm workflow completion and provide visibility when analysis is complete but no changes or outputs are required (e.g., 'No issues found', 'All checks passed'). This ensures the workflow produces human-visible output even when no other actions are taken.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","required":["message"],"properties":{"message":{"type":"string","description":"Status or completion message to log. 2026-03-24T22:29:34.1531908Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-24T22:29:34.1532194Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-24T22:29:34.1532670Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-24T22:29:34.1533004Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-24T22:29:34.1533115Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-03-24T22:29:34.1533249Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-03-24T22:29:34.1533329Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-03-24T22:29:34.1533506Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-03-24T22:29:34.1533578Z [36;1mfi[0m
